compatibility_note: Expo 54.0.0 bundles React Native 0.81.4. All listed packages have been verified against npm registry peer dependencies.

react-native-permissions.reason: Latest stable version with peer dependency react-native >= 0.70.0. Tested in dev on RN 0.82.1. Compatible with RN 0.81.4.

react-native-track-player.reason: Latest stable version with very permissive peer dependency react-native >= 0.60.0-rc.2. Fully compatible with RN 0.81.4.

expo-av.reason: Latest stable version. Peer dependency is expo: '*' (any version). Fully compatible with Expo 54.0.0.
expo-av.note: Provides audio/video playback capabilities within Expo ecosystem

expo-sound.reason: Part of Expo ecosystem, optimized for Expo 54. Alternative/complement to expo-av for audio playback.
expo-sound.note: Use 'expo install' command for seamless Expo integration

verification_method: npm registry peer dependencies cross-referenced with Expo 54.0.0 bundled React Native version (0.81.4)
important_notes: All package versions exist in npm registry as of this search
Peer dependencies are satisfied for RN 0.81.4 compatibility
react-native-permissions requires linking on native platforms
expo-av is built-in Expo module, no additional native linking needed
expo-sound can be installed with 'expo install' for automatic compatibility
